evidence: Fix fully implemented and consistent across all artifacts. rbt-session-init.sh exists at both feature-space authoring path and deployed surface path referenced by settings.json and feature.json. Hook parses @-import lines from CLAUDE.md, resolves paths against REPO_ROOT, and emits additionalContext+systemMessage JSON at session start (no counter gate). settings.json wires it under SessionStart. feature.json surface.hooks lists the hook. test-RABBIT-CAGE-10-session-init.sh covers 6 assertions (exists, executable, exit 0, valid JSON, additionalContext key, content contains 'Machine First') — all pass.
proposed_handoff: Bug resolved — hook deployed, wired, test-green; close RABBIT-CAGE-10.
